This single plan contains all 5 waves/tasks. Execute them sequentially:
1. Wave 0: TDD test scaffolds (RED - failing tests) for 15 hooks in tests/hooks/
2. Wave 1: Implement hooks with ≥5 test cases each (GREEN - passing tests)
3. Wave 2: Create 10+ integration test files for 5 high-risk modules in tests/integration/
4. Wave 3: Configure 90/80/90/90 coverage thresholds in .config/vitest.config.ts
5. Wave 3: Verification - run coverage analysis, typecheck, generate coverage-report.md

High-risk modules for integration tests:
- src/coordination/delegation/ (3 test files)
- src/task-management/continuity/ (2 test files)
- src/features/session-tracker/ (2 test files)
- src/coordination/completion/ (2 test files)
- src/tools/delegation/ (1 test file)

Constraints:
- No external packages - use existing vitest@4.1.7, typescript, zod
- No behavioral changes - tests only
- TDD: RED->GREEN->REFACTOR
- Max 500 LOC per test module
- Atomic commits per concern
- Commit format: fix(C7): what was fixed — why it matters
